title: Stenophyllus coarctatus

intro: Stenophyllus coarctatus, commonly known as Stenophyllus, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Stenophyllus coarctatus include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
